title: Xtra Spicy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A spicy and flavorful Malaysian chicken curry with a mustardy and slightly shaggy texture, perfect for midnight cravings. This dish is inspired by traditional Malaysian cuisine and is cooked in a terracotta dish.
instructions: Heat the ghee or oil in a large terracotta dish over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the curry powder, chili flakes, salt, and brown sugar, and cook for 1 minute.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and cook, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the mustard and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the curry hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro.
